character.definition: (same as 憮) to skip about; to dance for joy; to soothe, slow, disappointed
(non-classical form of 舉) to lift; to raise; to commend; to praise, entire; whole
bonds and fetters for falcons and dogs used in hunting
(same as 綮) crucial points; critical points, an embroidered banner, sheath for a lance head
flying, to run swiftly; to go at express speed
the head bone of livestock, the shoulder blade; scapula
to twist or nip with the fingers
to blow or breathe upon; to smile
(variant of 艤) to moor a boat to the bank
